name: mcp-server-desktop-commander
description: A swiss-army-knife that can manage/execute programs and read/write/search/edit code and text files.

rating.reason: Good documentation quality with comprehensive descriptions and detailed parameter documentation. Tool names are clear and specific. Most descriptions effectively explain functionality, usage context, and constraints (2-4 sentences). Parameter documentation is thorough with clear descriptions of purpose, types, and constraints. However, some descriptions are overly verbose with excessive implementation details and formatting instructions that could be more concise. The Docker-specific notes and repetitive path guidance, while informative, add unnecessary bulk to the core documentation.
